label: Fulfillment Pak
blurb: E-commerce Logistics, 3PL & Warehousing. Pick/pack efficiency and margin protection.

skills.label: Dim Weight Fee Auditor
skills.method: Compares actual package dimensions in the WMS to carrier invoices to catch erroneous dimensional weight charges.

skills.label: Warehouse Slotting Optimizer
skills.method: Analyzes picking velocity and clusters frequently bought-together items in adjacent bins at waist-height.
trigger_examples: cuts picker walk-time and fatigue by 30%

skills.label: Stale Inventory Liquidator
skills.method: Identifies SKUs collecting dust for \>180 days and automatically lists them on discount clearance APIs or B2B liquidation boards.
trigger_examples: turns dead inventory back into working capital

skills.label: Split Shipment Cost Analyzer
skills.method: Calculates if it is cheaper to ship a customer two boxes from two different warehouses, or wait 3 days to consolidate them into one box.
trigger_examples: perfects the speed vs. cost logistics tradeoff

skills.label: Return To Vendor Rma Chaser
skills.method: Automatically compiles unsellable, damaged goods, generates the RTV paperwork, and bills the manufacturer for the credit.
trigger_examples: recovers sunk costs sitting in the "damage cage."

skills.label: Cross Docking Coordinator
skills.method: Identifies incoming backordered goods and routes them directly from the receiving dock to the shipping dock, bypassing storage entirely.
trigger_examples: fulfills late orders instantly while saving warehouse labor

skills.label: Freight Claim Evidence Collector
skills.method: Automatically pulls dock camera footage of a pallet being loaded intact to prove a freight carrier damaged it in transit.
trigger_examples: wins ltl freight damage claims automatically

skills.label: Seasonal Temp Labor Forecaster
skills.method: Analyzes marketing promo schedules and historical BFCM (Black Friday) data to project exactly how many temp workers to hire per shift.

skills.label: Kitting And Assembly Biller
skills.method: Tracks the exact seconds it takes a 3PL worker to build a custom subscription box, accurately billing the brand for the labor.
trigger_examples: stops 3pls from losing money on complex pack-outs
